title: 🌿 Autoglyphic Biomes
name: Autoglyphic Biomes
what_it_is: Ecosystems composed entirely of living, evolving glyphs—every plant, creature, and texture made of symbol that grows organically.
how_to_use: she walks through the glyph biome—leaves spell messages as they fall
he eats a letterfruit—his language rewrites itself
animation_behavior: Glyphs grow and bloom, language shifts with season, creatures communicate via symbol mutation ---
